title: Disjoint Sets, Connectivity, and Offline Grouping · Cost-Model Clinic: Path Compression
summary: Track changing network connectivity across merges without scanning every member. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 path compression increment in a union-find service with measured compression. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace path compression and explain its interaction with later finds.
Apply union by rank or size without corrupting representative metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
